name: lobster-assistant
description: 龙虾助手 - OpenClaw 一键部署工具

scripts.pkg:mac-app: npm run build && rm -rf bin && mkdir -p bin && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output bin/lobster-macos-arm64 && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-macos-x64 --output bin/lobster-macos-x64 && ../../scripts/build-macos-app.sh bin/lobster-macos-arm64 bin/lobster-macos-arm64-app.zip $(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && ../../scripts/build-macos-app.sh bin/lobster-macos-x64 bin/lobster-macos-x64-app.zip $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
